channel.title: Twin Galaxies News
channel.description: The latest news and updates from Twin Galaxies — the world's original video game authority.

item.title: Play Tetris Is Now Live!
item.description: Head over to the Play Tetris section and challenge the leaderboard. Compete for the highest score and prove you're the ultimate arcade champion!

item.title: Community Chat Is On The Way
item.description: A real-time chat feature is in development to keep the entire Twin Galaxies community connected. Stay tuned for launch details.

item.title: User Authentication In The Works
item.description: Create your own account, track personal records, and manage your profile. Authentication is being built to bring a personalized experience.

item.title: Twin Galaxies Is Now On Instagram
item.description: Follow us on Instagram for highlights, retro clips, behind-the-scenes content, and community spotlights. Join the arcade nation!

item.title: Official Discord Server Created
item.description: Join the official Twin Galaxies Discord server to chat with players worldwide, share strategies, and stay up to date on events.
